title: tragacantha polyantha
intro: Tragacantha polyantha, also known as the common goat's thorn or gromwell, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Tragacantha polyantha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
